options.command: trap 'kill 0' SIGINT SIGTERM; unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; NX_DAEMON=false nx run-many --target=serve --projects=task-manager,dashboard,whisper-service --parallel & wait
for p in 3000 3001 4000 4001 4002 4200 4201 4202; do lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null; done | sort -u | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'All dev ports cleared'
